requirement_topic.en: Cell and Battery Pack Safety — IEC 62133 (as adopted in Uganda Standards)
requirement_topic.zh: 电芯与电池组安全——IEC 62133（乌干达标准采用）
requirement_topic.zht: 電芯與電池組安全——IEC 62133（烏干達標準採用）

summary.en: Uganda National Bureau of Standards (UNBS) adopts Uganda Standards (US) that are commonly aligned with or adopt international IEC standards. For portable sealed secondary lithium cells and battery packs, the applicable safety benchmark is typically IEC 62133-2 (Safety requirements for portable sealed secondary lithium cells and batteries — Part 2: Lithium systems), applied as the Uganda Standard that the product must demonstrate conformity with during UNBS Pre-Export Verification of Conformity (PVoC). The IEC 62133-2 test programme covers abuse testing (overcharge, external short-circuit, crush, drop, thermal abuse, forced discharge) and electrochemical safety limits. A recognised IEC 62133-2 test report from an accredited laboratory is the practical evidence used to obtain the UNBS Certificate of Conformity for in-scope products; UNBS may accept an IECEE CB Scheme certificate plus report as the basis of conformity.
summary.zh: 乌干达国家标准局（UNBS）采用乌干达标准（US），通常与国际IEC标准对齐或直接采用。对于便携式密封二次锂电芯及电池组，适用的安全基准通常为IEC 62133-2（便携式密封二次锂电芯及电池安全要求——第2部分：锂系统），作为乌干达标准在UNBS出口前一致性验证（PVoC）期间须证明符合。IEC 62133-2测试方案涵盖滥用测试（过充、外部短路、挤压、跌落、热滥用、强制放电）及电化学安全限值。由认可实验室出具的IEC 62133-2测试报告是为受监管产品取得UNBS合格证书的实际证据；UNBS可接受IECEE CB体系证书加报告作为一致性依据。
summary.zht: 烏干達國家標準局（UNBS）採用烏干達標準（US），通常與國際IEC標準對齊或直接採用。對於便攜式密封二次鋰電芯及電池組，適用的安全基準通常為IEC 62133-2（便攜式密封二次鋰電芯及電池安全要求——第2部分：鋰系統），作為烏干達標準在UNBS出口前一致性驗證（PVoC）期間須證明符合。IEC 62133-2測試方案涵蓋濫用測試（過充、外部短路、擠壓、跌落、熱濫用、強制放電）及電化學安全限值。由認可實驗室出具的IEC 62133-2測試報告是為受監管產品取得UNBS合格證書的實際證據；UNBS可接受IECEE CB體系證書加報告作為一致性依據。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62133-2:2017+AMD1:2021 — Safety requirements for portable sealed secondary lithium cells and batteries — Part 2: Lithium systems (adopted as Uganda Standard)
UNBS Pre-Export Verification of Conformity (PVoC) — conformity to the applicable Uganda Standard
IECEE CB Scheme — CB test certificate and report commonly accepted as conformity basis

summary.en: China's primary safety standards for portable lithium battery packs are GB 31241-2022 (Safety requirements for portable sealed secondary lithium cells and batteries for use in portable electronic equipment) and GB 18287 (general specification for mobile-phone lithium-ion batteries, under revision). GB 31241 is technically derived from IEC 62133 but contains national deviations in test severity and acceptance criteria. A test report to GB 31241 alone, issued by a Chinese CNAS-accredited laboratory, is not automatically equivalent to an IEC 62133-2 report; UNBS conformity is assessed against the adopted Uganda Standard (IEC-aligned), so an IEC 62133-2 / IECEE CB report is the more directly usable evidence.
summary.zh: 中国便携式锂电池组的主要安全标准为GB 31241-2022（便携式电子设备用密封二次锂电芯及电池安全要求）和GB 18287（手机用锂离子电池总规范，修订中）。GB 31241在技术上源自IEC 62133，但在测试严苛程度和验收准则方面存在国家偏差。仅由中国CNAS认可实验室出具的GB 31241测试报告，不自动等同于IEC 62133-2报告；UNBS一致性依据采用的乌干达标准（与IEC对齐）评估，因此IEC 62133-2/IECEE CB报告是更直接可用的证据。
summary.zht: 中國便攜式鋰電池組的主要安全標準為GB 31241-2022（便攜式電子設備用密封二次鋰電芯及電池安全要求）和GB 18287（手機用鋰離子電池總規範，修訂中）。GB 31241在技術上源自IEC 62133，但在測試嚴苛程度和驗收準則方面存在國家偏差。僅由中國CNAS認可實驗室出具的GB 31241測試報告，不自動等同於IEC 62133-2報告；UNBS一致性依據採用的烏干達標準（與IEC對齊）評估，因此IEC 62133-2/IECEE CB報告是更直接可用的證據。

standards_or_laws: GB 31241-2022 — Safety requirements for portable sealed secondary lithium cells and batteries for use in portable electronic equipment (SAC/SAMR)
GB 18287 — General specification for lithium-ion batteries for mobile phones (SAC, under revision)

gap.en: Uganda assesses lithium cell/pack safety against an IEC-aligned Uganda Standard (typically IEC 62133-2) during PVoC, not against GB 31241. Key gaps for Chinese exporters: (1) a GB 31241 report may not be accepted on its own — an IEC 62133-2 test report or an IECEE CB Scheme certificate plus report is the cleaner route to the UNBS Certificate of Conformity; (2) test severity and acceptance criteria differ between GB 31241 and IEC 62133-2 (notably crush and overcharge), so re-testing or a gap assessment may be required; (3) conformity must be demonstrated per shipment or per registered/licensed product under the chosen PVoC route, with the in-country importer presenting documentation at UNBS import inspection. Unlike the EU, there is no additional battery-labelling law (chemistry/capacity/QR) imposed by a Ugandan battery regulation, though product marking and importer/labelling requirements under general UNBS rules still apply.
gap.zh: 乌干达在PVoC期间依据与IEC对齐的乌干达标准（通常为IEC 62133-2）评估锂电芯/电池组安全，而非依据GB 31241。中国出口商的主要差距：（1）GB 31241报告可能不被单独接受——IEC 62133-2测试报告或IECEE CB体系证书加报告是取得UNBS合格证书更顺畅的路径；（2）GB 31241与IEC 62133-2在测试严苛程度和验收准则上存在差异（尤以挤压和过充为甚），可能须重新测试或进行差距评估；（3）须按所选PVoC路径以货批或注册/许可产品证明一致性，由境内进口商在UNBS进口检验时提交文件。与欧盟不同，乌干达没有电池法规施加的额外电池标签法律（化学体系/容量/二维码），但一般UNBS规则下的产品标识及进口商/标签要求仍适用。
gap.zht: 烏干達在PVoC期間依據與IEC對齊的烏干達標準（通常為IEC 62133-2）評估鋰電芯/電池組安全，而非依據GB 31241。中國出口商的主要差距：（1）GB 31241報告可能不被單獨接受——IEC 62133-2測試報告或IECEE CB體系證書加報告是取得UNBS合格證書更順暢的路徑；（2）GB 31241與IEC 62133-2在測試嚴苛程度和驗收準則上存在差異（尤以擠壓和過充為甚），可能須重新測試或進行差距評估；（3）須按所選PVoC路徑以貨批或登記/許可產品證明一致性，由境內進口商在UNBS進口檢驗時提交文件。與歐盟不同，烏干達沒有電池法規施加的額外電池標籤法律（化學體系/容量/二維碼），但一般UNBS規則下的產品標識及進口商/標籤要求仍適用。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for regulated products — conformity to the adopted Uganda Standard (typically IEC 62133-2) demonstrated through UNBS PVoC and Certificate of Conformity before import clearance; IECEE CB report commonly accepted as conformity basis
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for domestic market — GB 31241-2022 compliance required under SAMR framework for portable lithium batteries sold in China

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Uganda assesses portable lithium cell/pack safety against an IEC-aligned Uganda Standard (typically IEC 62133-2) within the UNBS PVoC process, leading to a Certificate of Conformity. An IEC 62133-2 test report or an IECEE CB Scheme certificate plus report is the practical evidence; a Chinese GB 31241 report alone is supporting engineering data and may not be accepted on its own because of national test-severity deviations. Exporters should secure IEC 62133-2 / CB evidence for the exact cell-pack configuration and route it through PVoC via the in-country importer.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 乌干达在UNBS PVoC流程内依据与IEC对齐的乌干达标准（通常为IEC 62133-2）评估便携式锂电芯/电池组安全，进而取得合格证书。IEC 62133-2测试报告或IECEE CB体系证书加报告是实际证据；仅凭中国GB 31241报告属支持性工程数据，因国家测试严苛度偏差可能不被单独接受。出口商应针对确切电芯-电池组配置取得IEC 62133-2/CB证据，并经境内进口商通过PVoC提交。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 烏干達在UNBS PVoC流程內依據與IEC對齊的烏干達標準（通常為IEC 62133-2）評估便攜式鋰電芯/電池組安全，進而取得合格證書。IEC 62133-2測試報告或IECEE CB體系證書加報告是實際證據；僅憑中國GB 31241報告屬支持性工程數據，因國家測試嚴苛度偏差可能不被單獨接受。出口商應針對確切電芯-電池組配置取得IEC 62133-2/CB證據，並經境內進口商通過PVoC提交。

source.publisher: Uganda National Bureau of Standards (UNBS) — Imports Inspection / PVoC; IEC 62133-2 as adopted Uganda Standard
